steps.title: Find the true subject
steps.content: The subject of the sentence is analysis, which is singular. The names James Melton and Tom Ginsburg appear in a possessive phrase modifying analysis, so they do not make the subject plural.

steps.title: Match singular agreement
steps.content: A, C, and D all use plural verb forms that do not agree with the singular subject analysis. The sentence needs a singular present-tense verb. The answer is B.
